thought.text: 我会先运行基线评分了解当前优化效果。

task_list.title: Inspect task4 optimization framework
task_list.notes: Classic pipeline runs StaticCallCounterPrinter, Mem2Reg, ConstantFolding. Need baseline score before adding passes.

task_list.title: Run baseline task4 score
task_list.notes: Measure correctness and performance before changes; identify bottleneck cases.

task_list.title: Implement additional safe optimizations
task_list.notes: Add simple custom passes such as DCE, CFG cleanup, algebraic simplification, local CSE if practical.

task_list.title: Verify task4 score and iterate
task_list.notes: Run task4-score and improve while preserving correctness.
